skill.name: maxhub-sora2
skill.description: Sora2 AI video generation and content creation tool via MaxHub API. Activates when users mention sora, AI, video generation, creation, or OpenAI-related needs.
skill.summary: Access Sora2 platform data through MaxHub API for content discovery, user analytics, and video metadata.
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: All 97 static findings evaluated as false positives. The skill is a read-only API wrapper for the Sora2 platform via MaxHub proxy. External commands flagged (63) are markdown code block examples showing curl syntax. System reconnaissance (8) are API path strings in documentation tables. Hardcoded URLs (5) are documented MaxHub API endpoints. Environment access (13) are explicitly declared credential requirements with clear security boundaries documented in metadata.

low_findings.title: Static Pattern False Positives
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 97 patterns that are all false positives: backtick markdown syntax in curl examples, API path strings in documentation tables, documented URLs, and declared env var requirements. No actual command execution, system access, or credential exfiltration detected.

content.user_title: Access Sora2 Data via MaxHub API Proxy
content.value_statement: Users need to integrate with Sora2 platform for content analytics, video metadata, and creator data. This skill provides a secure MaxHub API proxy to access Sora2 data without direct platform integration.
actual_capabilities: Fetch user profiles and follower data from Sora2 via MaxHub API
Retrieve video post details and remix lists
Search users and content by keywords
Access cameo leaderboards and trending feeds
Get video download information without watermarks
Fetch post comments and user following/followers lists
limitations: Read-only access only - no posting, commenting, or following actions
Video generation APIs are deprecated and not functional
Requires valid MaxHub API key for all operations

use_cases.title: Content Creator Analytics
use_cases.description: Analyze Sora2 creator performance by fetching user profiles, post lists, and follower metrics to identify trending creators.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content strategists

use_cases.title: Video Research Tool
use_cases.description: Search and retrieve video metadata including download information for academic or market research purposes.

use_cases.title: Creator Discovery
use_cases.description: Find top Sora2 creators via cameo leaderboards and search features to support influencer outreach.

prompt_templates.title: Basic User Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Find Sora2 users related to [keyword] using the MaxHub skill

prompt_templates.title: Creator Profile Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the profile and recent posts for Sora2 user [username]

prompt_templates.title: Trending Content Discovery
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the current Sora2 feed and cameo leaderboard

prompt_templates.title: Batch Creator Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare follower counts and post engagement for these Sora2 creators: [list usernames]

output_examples.output: Found 3 cooking creators on Sora2 with their profiles and latest video stats
Creator @foodie has 15,000 followers with 42 videos posted

best_practices: Configure MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables before use
Respect pagination limits - confirm before fetching more than 5 pages
Check account balance before running batch operations to avoid unexpected costs
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to modify user data, post content, or perform platform manipulation
Do not exceed rate limits or ignore cost warnings for batch operations
Do not expose API credentials in code or share keys between users

faq.question: What is MaxHub and why do I need it?
faq.answer: MaxHub is an API proxy service that provides a unified interface to access Sora2 platform data. You need a MaxHub API key to use this skill.

faq.question: Can I post videos or interact with content using this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill is read-only. It can only fetch data - no posting, commenting, following, or other write operations are supported.

faq.question: Why are some APIs marked as deprecated?
faq.answer: The video generation APIs (create_video, get_task_detail) are deprecated by the Sora2 platform and no longer function.

faq.question: How do I get a MaxHub API key?
faq.answer: Register at https://www.aconfig.cn, create an API key in the console, and set it as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: Are there rate limits or costs?
faq.answer: Yes, MaxHub API calls are billed per request. The skill warns when pagination exceeds 5 pages or before large batch operations.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill only accesses public data, does not store credentials, and does not access local files or browser data.
